members.name: GetShaderParameter
members.summary: Returns the current value set for this material of a uniform in the shader.

members.name: SetShaderParameter
members.signature: public void SetShaderParameter(StringName param, Variant value)
members.summary: Changes the value set for this material of a uniform in the shader. [b]Note:[/b] [param param] is case-sensitive and must match the name of the uniform in the code exactly (not the capitalized name in the inspector). [b]Note:[/b] Changes to the shader uniform will be effective on all instances using this [ShaderMaterial]. To prevent this, use per-instance uniforms with [method CanvasItem.set_instance_shader_parameter], [method GeometryInstance3D.set_instance_shader_parameter] or duplicate the [ShaderMaterial] resource using [method Resource.duplicate]. Per-instance uniforms allow for better shader reuse and are therefore faster, so they should be preferred over duplicating the [ShaderMaterial] when possible.

members.name: Shader
members.summary: The [Shader] program used to render this material.
